name: Marinated Veggies Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1/2 oz. (15 gm) dried wild mushrooms (porcini or shitake)
1/2 cup red wine vinegar or sherry vinegar
1/2 tsp salt and several twists of freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare tofu marinade 3 to 5 days in advance.
- Cut tofu into 1 inch slabs and let drain on a slanted board.
- Weigh down the tofu with a heavy object to press out excess water.
- Toast oregano (or marjoram).
- Simmer mushrooms in a cup of water for 15 minutes, add remaining marinade ingredients, then strain through a coffee filter.
- Place tofu in a non-corrosive dish or container and cover with marinade. Refrigerate for 3 to 5 days.
2. Prepare vegetable marinade:
- Combine 2 tbsp red wine vinegar, 1 clove garlic (finely chopped), 2 tbsp Dijon mustard, herb mixture (parsley, thyme, marjoram; all finely chopped), 1 tsp cornstarch, salt, and pepper.
3. Cut vegetables into 1 inch pieces:
- 1 green bell pepper
- 1 sweet onion
- 6 new potatoes (or other white potatoes) cut in half
- 1 small sweet potato or yam
- 12 cherry tomatoes
4. Arrange marinated tofu, mushrooms, and vegetables on skewers, alternating each item.
- For faster cooking, potatoes can be microwaved or boiled partially in advance.
5. Cook skewers on grill, hibachi, or under broiler, turning frequently and basting with vegetable marinade until potatoes are done and tofu is golden brown.
Serve with a mix of brown and wild rice cooked in vegetable broth and whole wheat sourdough bread.
